THERESA-REPLAY.description: View cards removed this run. Choose 1 to copy to your hand with Exhaust and cost reduced by 1 this turn. Each card can only be Replayed once per battle.
THERESA-REPLAY.title: Replay
THERESA-DUST.title: DUST
THERESA-HAUNT.title: HAUNT
THERESA-DIVIN.title: NAME
THERESA-SUMMON_SWORDSMAN.description: Summon the Swordsman (25 HP, 3 Strength). The Swordsman automatically attacks a random enemy at the start of your turn for 8 damage.
THERESA-SUMMON_SWORDSMAN.title: Summon Swordsman
THERESA-SUMMON_AMIYA.description: Summon Amiya (20 HP). Amiya heals all allies at the end of your turn, and can use [Crescendo] to deal damage to enemies.
THERESA-SUMMON_AMIYA.title: Summon Amiya
THERESA-LINGER.description: Play a copy of a Dust card at random. Cards with Exhaust are exhausted.
THERESA-LINGER.title: Linger
THERESA-DIM.title: Dim
